mapper.update: UPDATE novel_agent_config SET novel_id = #{novelId}, agent_type = #{agentType}, config_key = #{configKey}, config_value = #{configValue}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE config_id = #{configId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, config_id, novel_id, agent_type, config_key, config_value, status, create_time, update_time FROM novel_agent_config WHERE novel_id = #{novelId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY agent_type ASC, config_key ASC, update_time DESC

SELECT id, config_id, novel_id, agent_type, config_key, config_value, status, create_time, update_time FROM novel_agent_config WHERE novel_id IS NULL AND status = 1 ORDER BY agent_type ASC, config_key ASC, update_time DESC
